extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz out-sprinted EVENEPOEL Remco in final 50m of summit finish after UAE sent ALMEIDA solo with <1km to go forcing leaders to chase, gaining 6 seconds with bonuses.
tactical_patterns: UAE sent ALMEIDA solo <1km from summit forcing GC rivals to chase instead of positioning for sprint bonuses.
ROGLIC positioned inside every corner in final approach preventing EVENEPOEL psychological commitment to sprint launch.
Soudal Quick-Step paced valleys to tire peloton but Ineos Grenadiers took over on actual climb approach.
EVENEPOEL launched 300m out but ROGLIC sitting wheel negated time gap advantage, reversing GC through sprint positioning.

rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: positive: bridged solo to leaders after being nursed by YATES Adam, then attacked with <1km showing form beyond domestique role
rider_signals.CHICONE Giulio: negative: struggled to stay with lead group on final climb despite being third on GC, dropped to eighth overall
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: neutral: waited for ALMEIDA on local roads despite breakaway positioning suggesting team prioritized GC over stage win
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: launched sprint 300m out but couldn't hold off ROGLIC despite starting day level on time, lost psychological battle on corners
